Project: libknock
Purpose: Embeddable TCP pre-application authentication SDK for Go applications.

Read first:
- docs/agents/AGENTS.md
- docs/agents/integration-guide.md
- docs/getting-started.md
- docs/api.md
- docs/api-surface.md
- docs/modes.md

Normal integration:
- Use the root package.
- Prefer NewListener for server-side Go applications.
- Prefer Dialer for client-side Go applications.
- Use relay only for unmodified upstream binaries.

Do not:
- Start normal integrations from protocol/.
- Create per-connection replay caches.
- Put config-file parsing in SDK core.
- Treat auth-only or knock-auth-only as port hiding.
